name: Mike Nock
description: New Zealand born musician residing in Australia
abstract: Michael Anthony Nock  (born 27 September 1940) is a New Zealand jazz pianist, who lives and works in Australia.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Sam Rivers Quartet and Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: One is the quartet record in Australia with Mike Nock... It comes out of a Jamey clinic, and then we stayed and did a couple dates.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Marshall
about_quotes.evidence: Mike Nock, who was the piano player with Dionne... he says well before you go back, I’m going to start a band, me and Michael White are going to start this band... The first person who encouraged me to write music actually was Mike Nock.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Marshall interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Alan Broadbent
about_quotes.evidence: Mike Nock is another pretty famous New Zealander but he went in the (whatever you want to call it) jazz fusion thing that lost that feeling for me that I was interested in.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alan Broadbent interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 26, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Nicki Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: Mike Nock, a great piano player who is in New York, was one of my ensemble teachers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nicki Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe. Utica, New York, November 6, 2010 [interview 1 of 2]
